title: Can a Monday Workspace App version be Deployed with New Columns and Automatically Update the New Columns in the Existing Marketplace App?
excerpt:

posts.author: Timothy7 (Timothy Kariuki | CreativeBits LLC)
posts.cookedHtml:
We currently have our application available in the marketplace and have been diligently working on version 2.0, which we are preparing to deploy.

In this new version, we have introduced additional Monday.com columns on our v2.0 boards. However, when attempting to upload the new version in our test account, we noticed that the new columns are not being automatically added.

Could you please advise if there is a method to ensure that these columns are automatically created when deploying version 2.0 to all our customers who have the app installed in their accounts without interfering with their existing data?

Your assistance in resolving this issue would be greatly appreciated.
